data.body:
GAP AMENDMENTS from opus gap analysis:

1. Run format check inside main() AFTER the empty-FILES guard (not at script init).

2. FILES[] contains relative paths — resolve each to absolute: '$REPO_ROOT/$_f'. This is correct for gate-2d (unlike gate-2b which receives absolute paths).

3. Run format check in subshell with cd REPO_ROOT: (cd "$REPO_ROOT" && $CMD_FORMAT_CHECK "${_abs_files[@]}" >/dev/null 2>&1)

4. Handle exit 127 (command not found) as soft-skip with [DSO WARN] — distinct from format violations.

5. Evidence string: single-line description only, no raw format output. Strip newlines before appending to _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE.

6. Empty-string value for commands.format_check: treat same as absent (CMD_FORMAT_CHECK empty after read → WARN+skip).

7. Early-exit path (line 335 — no files provided): skip format check, _FORMAT_CHECK_EVIDENCE stays empty.
